title: Challenges
description: A library mod that adds challenges to Minecraft.
body:
[![Bisect Hosting Promotion Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ee9630c7-c981-45f9-9862-3a1d71a628bf.webp)](https://redirect.daqem.com?to=https%3A%2F%2Fbisecthosting.com%2FDAQEM%3Fr%3DChallengesModrinth) [![Ko-fi Promotion Banner](https://i.imgur.com/SU7HhbO.png)](https://ko-fi.com/daqem)
NOTE: This mod does nothing by itself, it is a library for modpack creators to make challenges with datapacks. I'm currently working on my own Challange packs. A library mod that adds challenges to Minecraft. Features: - Use gets assigned x (default 3) challenges from each challenges pack and can choose one of them. - Completing a challenges gives the player a reward. This can be any reward (Using Arc) - Players can browse Challenges packs in game using a custom API.
